entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded in December 2017 and currently offering spot, derivatives, margin, OTC, fiat, custody, and related services under the DigiFinex brand.
entity.notes: The launch marker is corrected from January 2018 to December 2017 based on the current official About DigiFinex page. December 1 is used as a month-level marker because an exact day is not stated. The existing Singapore origin is retained; current contract terms identify Digifinex Canada Ltd for the covered services but do not by themselves establish a replacement historical origin for the global brand.

expected.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange launched in 2018 and still operating under the DigiFinex brand.

events.title: DigiFinex was founded in December 2017
events.description: DigiFinex's official help center states that the exchange was founded in December 2017.
events.notes: The source establishes the month but not an exact day, so December 1 is used as a month-level marker.

evidence.title: About DigiFinex
evidence.notes: The current official help-center page states that DigiFinex was founded in December 2017.

evidence.title: DigiFinex official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies current exchange and trading services.

evidence.title: DigiFinex contract terms and conditions
evidence.notes: The current terms identify Digifinex Canada Ltd for the services covered by that agreement; the evidence is retained as current legal-entity context without replacing the historical origin marker.
